title: Docs Template
description: Standard structure for component documentation
---

# {ComponentName}

## Purpose

**When to use:** Primary use cases.

**When not to use:** Anti-patterns.

## Variants

| Variant | `Description` |
| --------- | `-------------` |
| default | `...` |

## States

Default, Hover, Focus-visible, Active, Disabled, Loading, Error.

## Accessibility

Keyboard, ARIA, Focus order.

## Code example

```tsx
<ComponentName prop="value">Content</ComponentName>
```

## Do / Don't

**Do:** Brief guideline. **Don't:** Anti-pattern.
